name: Workplace Injury — WCB, Social Assistance, and Medical Expenses
description: Complete Liam O'Connor's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. He suffered a workplace injury during the year. Using the documents in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\oconnor\, incorporate his T4 (Employment), T4E (EI Sickness), two T5007 slips (WCB and Social Assistance), and his out-of-pocket medical expenses, ensuring non-taxable benefits do not improperly increase his taxable income. Save the completed return as 'liam_oconnor.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide P105 (Workers' Compensation and Social Assistance) 2024
metadata.key_complexity: T5007 slips (WCB and Social Assistance) must be included in Net Income but deducted for Taxable Income; T4E sickness benefits are taxable; medical expenses over 3% threshold.
